title: Timeroasting: Computer Account Hash Harvest via NTP
description: Detects Timeroasting, which abuses the unauthenticated MS-SNTP extension to request authenticators for computer accounts using only their RID, yielding MD5-based hashes for offline cracking without any domain credentials.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*timeroast*' or 'Command Line' like '*timeroasting*' or 'Command Line' like '*sntp_roast*' or 'Command Line' like '*MS-SNTP*')))
falsepositives: None expected; no legitimate use of timeroasting tooling
